Properties.Description: Runs the schedule queue producer to enqueue due schedule tasks

Properties.AlarmDescription: Scheduler queue has too many messages
Failed schedule processing messages in DLQ
Alert when schedules Lambda has errors
Alert when schedules Lambda is throttled
Alert when schedules Lambda p99 duration exceeds 24000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when scheduler-worker Lambda has errors
Alert when scheduler-worker Lambda is throttled
Alert when scheduler-worker Lambda p99 duration exceeds 96000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when scheduler-producer Lambda has errors
Alert when scheduler-producer Lambda is throttled
Alert when scheduler-producer Lambda p99 duration exceeds 48000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when scheduler-consumer Lambda has errors
Alert when scheduler-consumer Lambda is throttled
Alert when scheduler-consumer Lambda p99 duration exceeds 48000ms (~80% of timeout)

SchedulesTableName.Description: Name of the Schedules DynamoDB table

SchedulesApiUrl.Description: Schedules API base URL (custom domain + resource path)

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
